name: Apache Seata
description: Distributed transaction framework for microservices open-sourced by Alibaba & Ant Financial; Apache TLP.

seo.title: Apache Seata — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Apache Seata: Distributed transaction framework for microservices open-sourced by Alibaba & Ant Financial; Apache TLP.

when_to_use: Saga pattern implementation for long-running workflows
ACID guarantees for order + inventory service pair
Two-phase commit for multi-DB write consistency
Ant Financial-grade consistency for payment workflows

pros: Handles distributed transactions without homemade sagas
Proven at Alibaba and Ant scale
cons: Perf overhead on AT mode at volume
review.verdict: Seata solves real pain but adds its own operational weight—only adopt when sagas in code hurt more.
review.best_for: Microservice teams with cross-service ACID needs and engineers to run Seata
review.not_for: Small teams where event sourcing or saga patterns would be simpler
